word: H7139 - קָרַח - qârach - kaw-rakh' - Make bald

sections.paragraph:
Original: קרח

Transliteration: qârach

Phonetic: kaw-rakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be bald, make bald
    1. (Qal) to make bald, make a baldness
    2. (Niphal) to make oneself bald
    3. (Hiphil) to make oneself bald
    4. (Hophal) to make bald

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2069

Part(s) of speech: Verb
